name: ambient-code
description: Access frontier open-source models — GLM, Kimi K2, Qwen, and more — from inside Claude Code, over the Ambient (ambient.xyz) decentralized inference network. Adds a /ambient control panel with a sticky model picker, second-opinion code audits that Claude cross-checks, native `ambient build` file generation, and a delegate mode where Ambient writes the token-heavy code under Claude's review.
